sets.title: Set 0 - Mixed Full Test
sets.description: Random full TOEFL ITP-like simulation generated from all active practice sets.

sets.title: Practice Set 1
sets.description: Beginner quick practice set with 10 Listening, 10 Structure, and 10 Reading questions.

sets.title: Practice Set 2
sets.description: Medium TOEFL ITP-like practice set with 20 Listening, 20 Structure, and 20 Reading questions.

sets.title: Practice Set 3
sets.description: Advanced long practice set with 30 Listening, 30 Structure, and 30 Reading questions.

sets.title: Practice Set 4
sets.description: Advanced TOEFL ITP-like practice set with 20 Listening, 25 Structure, and 20 Reading questions including long academic passages.

sets.title: Practice Set 5
sets.description: Comprehensive TOEFL ITP-like practice set with 20 Listening, 15 Structure, and 15 Reading questions featuring long academic passages

sets.title: Practice Set 6 - Full TOEFL ITP
sets.description: Complete full-length TOEFL ITP test with 50 Listening, 40 Structure, and 50 Reading questions following official test format
